summary: Integration audit passed. 1 critical issue (get_all_open_trades missing), 1 important (sibling import), 1 note (import path inconsistency).

findings.title: get_all_open_trades method does not exist on ShadowStateDB
findings.rationale: Portfolio endpoint returns empty list gracefully via hasattr guard. No crash risk. Real data wiring is future work (T6).

findings.title: Sibling module import in api/ package
findings.detail: data_providers.py lazy-imports from sibling websocket.py inside try/except. Unidirectional dependency, no circular import risk. Safe at runtime.
findings.rationale: Lazy import + RuntimeError guard prevents circular dependency. Cross-concern coupling is minor; extracting to routes.py would add complexity for minimal gain.

findings.title: Inconsistent import path between api_server.py and routes.py
findings.detail: api_server.py uses relative import (from api.data_providers), routes.py uses absolute (from marketmind.api.data_providers). Both work at runtime due to sys.path setup.

passes: Import boundaries: No circular imports. DAG respected.
Interface consistency: All public APIs have consistent signatures.
WebSocket data flow: add_log_entry → create_task → broadcast_log → broadcast → send_text — complete.
API route registration: All 10 routes + /ws WebSocket endpoint registered correctly.
Backward compatibility: RankingEngine delegation wrappers preserved. ShadowStateDB init_schema wrapper preserved.
Module cohesion: 4 api/ files each have distinct responsibilities.
